equipmentDetails.name: Dumbbell Press
instructions: Sit on a bench with dumbbells at shoulder height
Press the dumbbells upward and slightly forward
Lower back to starting position with control
Keep your core engaged throughout
Repeat for desired number of reps
tips: Great for building upper body strength
Always use proper form over heavy weight

equipmentDetails.name: Barbell Squat
instructions: Place the barbell on your shoulders
Position your feet shoulder-width apart
Lower your body by bending knees and hips
Keep your chest up and core tight
Push through your heels to stand back up
tips: This is a compound exercise for leg strength
Don't let your knees cave inward
Go as low as your mobility allows

equipmentDetails.name: Cable Row
instructions: Sit at the cable machine facing it
Grab the handle with both hands
Pull the handle toward your chest
Squeeze your back muscles at the top
Return to starting position with control

equipmentDetails.name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit in the machine with back against the pad
Place your feet on the platform shoulder-width apart
Lower the weight by bending your knees
Push through your heels to extend your legs
Don't lock your knees at the top
tips: Don't go too heavy too fast

equipmentDetails.name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Bend your knees and hinge at the hips
Swing the kettlebell between your legs
Explosively swing it up to chest height
Control the descent and repeat
tips: Don't use your arms to lift
Use your hips as the power source

equipmentDetails.name: Push-ups
instructions: Start in a plank position with hands shoulder-width apart
Lower your body until chest nearly touches ground
Push yourself back up to starting position
Keep your body in a straight line
Maintain proper core engagement
tips: Control the descent for better results

equipmentDetails.name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at your sides
Keep your elbows close to your body
Curl the dumbbells up to shoulder height
Lower back to starting position with control
Squeeze your biceps at the top
tips: Control both the lifting and lowering

equipmentDetails.name: Cable Machine Chest Fly
instructions: Set cables to shoulder height
Stand in the middle facing away from the machine
Grab handles with cables set out to sides
Pull handles together across your body
Squeeze your chest and return to start
tips: Maintain a slight bend in elbows
Squeeze at the peak of contraction
